title: Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan

seo.title: Authentic Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan Recipe

seo.h1: Authentic Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan Recipe
h2Headings: What are Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan?
Ingredients for Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan
How to Make Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan: Step-by-Step
Tips for the Best Dan Dan Noodles
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of authentic Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan with spicy chili oil, minced pork, and fresh greens.
seo.imageCaption: Get ready to slurp up these incredibly flavorful and spicy Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan – a true taste of China!

description: Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan is a beloved classic, featuring springy noodles tossed in a rich, spicy, and savory sauce. This iconic dish is topped with crispy minced pork, a vibrant chili oil, and often includes preserved vegetables for an irresistible crunch. Every bite delivers a symphony of flavors from the numbing spice of Sichuan peppercorns to the deep umami of soy and sesame.

ingredients.notes: green parts sliced for garnish, white parts minced

instructions.title: Prepare the Noodle Sauce Base
instructions.text: In four separate serving bowls, combine 1 tablespoon of light soy sauce, 1/2 teaspoon of dark soy sauce, 1/2 tablespoon of Chinkiang vinegar, 3/4 tablespoon of toasted sesame paste, 1-1.5 tablespoons of chili oil with sediment, 1/4 teaspoon of Sichuan peppercorn powder, 1/4 teaspoon of sugar, and 1/2 tablespoon of chicken broth or water. Stir each bowl to combine the sauce ingredients.

instructions.title: Cook the Minced Pork Topping
instructions.text: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the ground pork and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is browned and crispy. Drain any excess fat. Add 1 tablespoon of Shaoxing wine and stir for 30 seconds.

instructions.title: Add Aromatics and Preserved Greens to Pork
instructions.text: Push the cooked pork to one side of the wok. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil. Add the minced white parts of scallions, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the empty side of the wok. Sauté for 1 minute until fragrant. Add the finely chopped Sichuan preserved mustard greens Yacai and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes with the pork. Remove from heat and set aside.

instructions.title: Prepare the Noodles and Greens
instructions.text: Bring a large pot of water to a rolling boil. Add the fresh Chinese wheat noodles and cook according to package directions until al dente, usually 2-4 minutes for fresh noodles. If using, blanch the bok choy or spinach in the same boiling water for about 30 seconds until tender-crisp. Drain the noodles and greens well.

instructions.title: Assemble the Dan Dan Noodles
instructions.text: Quickly divide the hot, drained noodles among the four prepared serving bowls, placing them directly on top of the sauce mixture. Add a portion of the cooked minced pork and preserved greens topping over the noodles in each bowl.

instructions.title: Garnish and Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Garnish each bowl generously with the sliced green parts of scallions. If using, arrange the blanched bok choy or spinach on the side. Instruct each diner to thoroughly stir their bowl before eating to combine the rich sauce with the noodles and toppings. Serve piping hot.

tips: For the most authentic flavor, always toast whole Sichuan peppercorns in a dry pan until fragrant, then grind them fresh. This enhances their unique numbing and aromatic qualities.
Sichuan preserved mustard greens (Yacai) are key to the dish's flavor. If unavailable, you can substitute with finely chopped preserved radish or even fermented cabbage, but the taste will vary.
Dan Dan Noodles are best enjoyed immediately after assembly. Ensure everyone is ready to eat as soon as the noodles are cooked and combined with the sauce to prevent them from clumping.
article: Dan Dan Noodles Sichuan is a beloved Chinese Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across Chinese. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
